Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TruffleRuby 167 upvotes, 21 comments
  2. TinyLoRA – Learning to Reason in 13 Parameters 214 upvotes, 37 comments
  3. MiniStack (replacement for LocalStack) 275 upvotes, 55 comments
  4. CERN levels up with new superconducting karts 276 upvotes, 59 comments
  5. Chess in SQL 127 upvotes, 24 comments
  6. Bring Back MiniDV with This Raspberry Pi FireWire Hat 92 upvotes, 17 comments
  7. 4D Doom 252 upvotes, 62 comments
  8. A dot a day keeps the clutter away 442 upvotes, 132 comments
  9. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 357 upvotes, 115 comments
  10. Claude Code Unpacked : A visual guide 823 upvotes, 299 comments
  11. Consider the Greenland Shark (2020) 37 upvotes, 7 comments
  12. Intuiting Pratt Parsing 86 upvotes, 24 comments
  13. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 1296 upvotes, 524 comments
  14. Show HN: 1-Bit Bonsai, the First Commercially Viable 1-Bit LLMs 336 upvotes, 134 comments
  15. Show HN: CLI to order groceries via reverse-engineered REWE API (Haskell) 155 upvotes, 59 comments
  16. Claude Wrote a Full FreeBSD Remote Kernel RCE with Root Shell (CVE-2026-4747) 148 upvotes, 56 comments
  17. Is BGP Safe Yet? No. Test Your ISP 109 upvotes, 44 comments
  18. OpenAI demand sinks on secondary market as Anthropic runs hot 77 upvotes, 29 comments
  19. New Patches Allow Building Linux IPv6-Only, Option to Deprecate "Legacy" IPv4 56 upvotes, 20 comments
  20. Ada and Spark on ARM Cortex-M – A Tutorial with Arduino and Nucleo Examples 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. AI has suddenly become more useful to open-source developers 15 upvotes, 3 comments
  22. OnlyOffice kills Nextcloud partnership for forking its project without approval 19 upvotes, 5 comments
  23. Neanderthals survived on a knife's edge for 350k years 205 upvotes, 153 comments
  24. OpenAI closes funding round at an $852B valuation 491 upvotes, 453 comments
  25. Show HN: Sycamore – next gen Rust web UI library using fine-grained reactivity 57 upvotes, 42 comments
  26. I Quit. The Clankers Won 288 upvotes, 294 comments
  27. Show HN: Baton – A desktop app for developing with AI agents 46 upvotes, 37 comments
  28. Apple Removes iPhone Vibe Coding App from App Store 8 upvotes, 3 comments
  29. Slop is not necessarily the future 281 upvotes, 456 comments
  30. Wasmer (YC S19) Is Hiring – Rust and DevRel Positions 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 11:30pm, 1 April 2026. Source here.
